global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body. It features olive-green upperparts and a bright yellow throat and breast. The wings are gray with two white wing bars, and the tail is long and slightly forked.

part_details.upperparts: Olive-green, smooth feathers covering the back and head.
part_details.throat_breast: Bright yellow, vibrant feathers on the front of the neck and chest.
part_details.wings: Gray with two distinct white wing bars, medium length.
part_details.tail: Long, slightly forked, gray with subtle white edges.

spatial_relations: The bright yellow throat transitions into the olive-green upperparts.
The gray wings are positioned laterally with white bars across them.
The long tail extends from the rear, slightly forked.
